lead.name: lead
lead.default: 'Founded in 1982, The Butcher''s Craft began as a small family atelier dedicated to the pursuit of the perfect steak.'

body.name: body
body.default: 'Our master butchers hand-select every cut, aging them with patience and precision to achieve remarkable depth of flavor.'

description.name: description
description.default: 'Located in the heart of the historic district, our flagship boutique offers personal consultations with our master butchers.'

description.name: description
description.default: 'Curated selections of the world''s finest prime cuts.'
